body.title: Epic: Igor-as-user — SWADL as hands, Google as first practice
body.result: closed as noise per Akien review 2026-06-07
body.description:
Umbrella for the Igor-as-person work. Teach Igor to interact with the web through SWADL page/flow objects, with CC as pair-programmer rather than code generator. Google first (Gmail → security page → API-key creation) because it unlocks all other web services when mastered.

## Why
Akien: 'make him work thru it. building the automation. thinking about it in his graph matrix.' The point isn't adding SWADL to a toolbox — it's introducing software-design concepts (PAGE_OBJECT, FLOW_OBJECT, SELECTOR, IDEMPOTENCE) as first-class nodes in Igor's cortex, co-activated with the specific site nodes, so the abstraction transfers to the next site. When Igor can build and reason about a page object, he has generalized one level up.

## Why SWADL over browser-use
browser-use tends to go off on its own (creating accounts, etc.). SWADL's action space is bounded by what page/flow objects have been modeled — drift happens inside the envelope Akien wrote, not outside it. Matches clan-sheet inertia model: human writes the shape, Igor lives within it, autonomy grows as more shape is added. One framework, deterministic, bounded.

## Children (in order)
- T-swadl-vendor — vendor SWADL + smoke run (CC, housekeeping)
- T-swadl-concepts-in-graph — seed SWADL concepts as FACTUAL nodes with edges (CC+Igor, Igor deposits)
- T-gmail-login-page-object — first page object, collaborative (Igor proposes, CC reviews, iterate)
- T-gmail-flow-layer — send / read / archive flow objects
- T-igor-manages-own-api-keys — graduation mission (deferred until OR has budget again)

## Non-goals
- Any automation that creates accounts
- Payment flows
- Anything not explicitly modeled in a page/flow object

## Biomimetic note
SWADL's page-object/flow-object split mirrors cortex/TWM. Selectors are the cortical layer (stable shape of a thing); flow objects are the working-memory layer (what you're doing with it). Igor already has this split — teaching him SWADL is teaching him to recognize his own architecture in a different medium.
